body: --findings Tyler and Camera Op travel to Marrakech. First return since December 1119. The first word was the name of CAVE-001. Ahmad ibn Yusuf was present when Tyler began writing. The archive is the completion of Ahmad's unfinished sentence: 'and yet the Islamic geographers, beginning with—'. MARRAKECH-001 classified EXECUTION-SITE / ARCHIVE-ORIGIN. Two 0ft sites: CAVE-001 (decision) and MARRAKECH-001 (execution). Mechanism archive-state signal locks independently. Build 0108. Tyler: 'I have been answering.' Footnote #102.
title: S10E06: 'Marrakech, December 1119' — archive origin found, first word revealed, Ahmad watched Tyler begin
